disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden severe left-sided lower abdominal pain of abrupt onset four hours ago
trigger_question_examples: Where is the pain and when did it start?
How did the pain come on?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It hit him suddenly about four hours ago — a tearing, cramping pain low down on the left side of his belly.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Large-volume bright red blood per rectum / bloody diarrhoea following the pain
trigger_question_examples: What did the diarrhoea look like?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Straight after the pain he passed a whole bowl of bright red blood — a big amount, really sudden.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Near-syncope, profound weakness and light-headedness on movement — circulatory compromise
trigger_question_examples: Has he felt faint or like he might pass out?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He nearly blacked out when the bleeding happened and feels like he'll faint whenever he tries to sit up. He can't stand.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Background established cardiovascular disease (coronary bypass) — vasculopath
trigger_question_examples: Does he have any heart or circulation problems?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — he has heart disease and had a heart bypass about five years ago.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Accidental double dose of antihypertensive (ramipril) yesterday with a low-BP episode
trigger_question_examples: Any changes to his medications recently?
Did he take his tablets as usual?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He accidentally took a double dose of his blood pressure tablet yesterday and was very light-headed for a while.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No recent travel or dietary change, no prior chronic bowel symptoms or weight loss
trigger_question_examples: Any recent travel, new foods, or unwell contacts?
Has he had any long-standing bowel problems or weight loss before this?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No travel, no new foods, and he's never had ongoing bowel trouble or weight loss before this.
